ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Cashew Nuts (32%), Walnuts (27%), Brazil Nuts (20%), Macadamia Nuts (10%), Pistachio Nuts (10%). For allergens see ingredients in bold. May contain peanuts, sesame and other nuts
